summary: Iteration 191: Blind Test del Preventivatore Predittivo - Confronto AI vs Manuale. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend /confronto page verified with full comparison report showing confidence gauge, KPI cards, category breakdown, line-by-line matching, and AI insights.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content warning in browser console - API request to HTTP blocked when page loaded over HTTPS. This appears to be a browser/environment issue as the API works correctly via curl.

issues: Minor React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span> in tbody - doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/preventivatore/confronta correctly compares AI vs Manual quotes with delta calculations
Confidence score algorithm works: <5% = 95 (Eccellente), <10% = 85 (Buono), <20% = 70 (Accettabile), <30% = 55 (Da verificare), else = Significativo scostamento
Category breakdown includes materiali, manodopera, conto_lavoro with AI/Manual/Delta/Delta%
Line-by-line matching uses category-based matching (IPE, HEA, PIASTRA, BULLONI, MANODOPERA, TRATTAMENTI)
AI insights generated based on peso, ore, and category scostamenti
GET /api/preventivatore/prezzi-storici returns historical prices from DDT/invoices with defaults
POST /api/preventivatore/calcola correctly applies margins 15/40/10 for materiali/manodopera/conto_lavoro
Frontend ConfrontoPreventivi.js has proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: Test quotes already exist in database: PV-2026-0045-AI (AI) and PV-2026-0043-MAN (Manual)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 191 tested the Preventivatore Predittivo Blind Test - Confronto AI vs Manuale. Key findings: (1) POST /api/preventivatore/confronta compares two quotes and returns: titolo, progetto, confidence_score (0-100), giudizio, scostamento_totale_pct, confronto_categorie (materiali/manodopera/conto_lavoro/subtotale with ai/manuale/delta/delta_pct), confronto_ore, confronto_peso, confronto_righe (line-by-line matching), insights (AI observations), preventivo_ai, preventivo_manuale. (2) GET /api/preventivatore/prezzi-storici returns historical prices from DDT/invoices with defaults for S275JR, S355JR, bulloneria, zincatura_kg, verniciatura_kg. (3) POST /api/preventivatore/calcola calculates quote with specified margins. (4) Frontend /confronto page shows full comparison report with confidence gauge, KPI cards, category table, line-by-line table, and AI insights. (5) URL params ?ai=X&man=Y auto-trigger comparison. (6) Test quotes: prev_d1b1e1e3e3cb (AI) vs prev_manuale_sasso (Manual) show 120.4% scostamento totale.

ConfrontoPreventivi.subtitle: ✓ 'Preventivo AI vs Preventivo Manuale'
ConfrontoPreventivi.category_table: ✓ Confronto per Categoria with Materiali/Manodopera/Conto Lavoro/Subtotale
